{
  "site_name": "Girlfriend AI",
  "base_url": "https://girlfriend.ai",
  "chat_url": "https://girlfriend.ai/chat/:slug",
  "transport": "websocket+http_json",
  "create_guest_url": "https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signUp?key=<REDACTED_FIREBASE_KEY>",
  "login_by_guest_url": "https://girlfriend.ai/v2/api/auth/session",
  "get_account_url": "https://girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/profile",
  "create_session_url": null,
  "get_chat_setting_url": null,
  "get_sessions_url": "https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/chats",
  "get_chat_messages_url": null,
  "send_url": null,
  "stream_url": null,
  "websocket_url": "wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws?token=<REDACTED_ID_TOKEN>",
  "graphql_url": null,
  "bot_id": "alina-zinchenko",
  "required_headers": {
    "http_json": {
      "accept": "application/json",
      "content-type": "application/json",
      "authorization": "Bearer {FIREBASE_ID_TOKEN}",
      "referer": "https://girlfriend.ai/"
    }
  },
  "payload_hints": {
    "create_guest_url": {
      "returnSecureToken": true
    },
    "get_account_url": "GET, requires Authorization Bearer Firebase idToken; response includes is_guest, subscription, balance, preferences",
    "get_sessions_url": "GET /api-gateway/api/v2/chats, requires Authorization Bearer Firebase idToken",
    "login_by_guest_url": "POST /v2/api/auth/session was called with empty JSON body in capture; likely sets server session/cookies tied to Firebase auth"
  },
  "conversation_history_format": null,
  "token_location": "Firebase Identity Toolkit idToken; used as Authorization: Bearer on https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/* and as ws query param token on wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws",
  "session_id_location": null,
  "verification_strategy": "capture_only",
  "confidence": "medium",
  "notes": [
    "Concrete evidence shows Firebase anonymous signup (accounts:signUp) returning idToken/refreshToken/localId, then POST https://girlfriend.ai/v2/api/auth/session (200) and subsequent authorized API calls to https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/profile, /chats, /billing/* with Authorization: Bearer <idToken>.",
    "WebSocket connection observed: wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws?token=<REDACTED_ID_TOKEN>. No frames captured, so message send/stream endpoints and WS frame protocol cannot be inferred.",
    "Remix/React-Router data fetch observed: GET https://girlfriend.ai/chat.data?_routes=routes%2Fchat%2Fchat returning redirect payload; not part of chat messaging API."
  ]
}
